/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/TP1_GraphReview_student.dir/TP1/ex1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TP1_GraphReview_student.dir/TP1/ex2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TP1_GraphReview_student.dir/TP1/ex3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TP1_GraphReview_student.dir/TP1/ex4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TP1_GraphReview_student.dir/TP1/ex5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TP1_GraphReview_student.dir/data_structures/createGraphs.cpp.o -o TP1_GraphReview_student  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgmock.a lib/libgmock_main.a lib/libgmock.a lib/libgtest.a
